business.title: Stocks Slump as US-Iran War Lifts Brent Toward $80: Markets Wrap - Bloomberg.com

elementary.en: Stocks went down and the dollar went up because of military strikes in the Middle East. Oil prices increased a lot, causing worries about higher inflation affecting the global economy.
elementary.ko: 주식이 하락하고 달러가 상승했습니다. 중동의 군사 공격 때문에 기름 가격이 많이 올랐고, 이것이 세계 경제에 미치는 인플레이션 증가에 대한 우려를 낳았습니다.

middle.en: Stocks fell sharply, and the value of the dollar increased as military actions escalated in the Middle East. This situation caused oil prices to rise significantly, reaching their highest level in four years. People are worried that rising inflation could negatively impact the global economy.
middle.ko: 주식이 급락하고 달러 가치가 상승했습니다. 이는 중동에서 군사 작전이 격화되면서 발생했습니다. 이로 인해 유가가 4년 만에 최고 수준으로 상승했으며, 인플레이션 상승이 세계 경제에 부정적인 영향을 미칠 수 있다는 우려가 커지고 있습니다.

high.en: Stocks declined sharply and the dollar strengthened as military actions escalated in the Middle East. This turmoil led to a significant rise in oil prices, marking the largest increase in four years, and raised fears that accelerating inflation could adversely impact the global economy.
high.ko: 주식이 급락하고 달러가 강세를 보인 것은 중동에서 군사 작전이 격화되면서 발생했습니다. 이 혼란은 석유 가격의 큰 상승을 초래했으며, 이는 4년 만에 가장 큰 증가를 기록했으며, 가속화되는 인플레이션이 세계 경제에 부정적인 영향을 미칠 수 있다는 우려를 불러일으켰습니다.

business.title: How long do electric vehicle batteries actually last? - NPR

elementary.en: Electric vehicle (EV) batteries last longer than many people expected, with new data showing they can hold up well over time. Although they do degrade, the initial decline in battery health is not as severe as previously thought.
elementary.ko: 전기차(EV) 배터리는 많은 사람들이 예상했던 것보다 더 오래 지속되며, 새로운 데이터에 따르면 시간이 지나도 잘 유지될 수 있습니다. 비록 배터리는 노화되지만, 초기 건강 저하는 이전에 생각했던 것만큼 심각하지 않습니다.

middle.en: Electric vehicle (EV) batteries were initially thought to last around seven years, but recent data shows they are lasting longer than expected. As batteries age, they experience two types of degradation: calendar aging and cyclical aging, which means they will eventually hold less energy regardless of usage. However, the decline in battery health is not as severe as previously feared, and many used EVs are still performing well after several years on the road.
middle.ko: 전기차(EV) 배터리는 처음에 약 7년 정도 지속될 것으로 예상되었지만, 최근 데이터에 따르면 예상보다 더 오래 지속되고 있습니다. 배터리가 노화됨에 따라 두 가지 유형의 열화가 발생하는데, 이는 시간에 따른 열화와 사용에 따른 열화로, 결국 사용량에 관계없이 에너지를 덜 보유하게 됩니다. 그러나 배터리 건강의 감소는 이전에 우려했던 것만큼 심각하지 않으며, 많은 중고 EV가 도로에서 몇 년이 지난 후에도 여전히 잘 작동하고 있습니다.

high.en:
The longevity of electric vehicle (EV) batteries has been a topic of concern since their introduction 15 years ago, with initial predictions suggesting a lifespan of around seven years. This raised apprehensions among potential buyers, especially considering the average age of cars on the road exceeds 12 years. While EV batteries are backed by warranties, they often do not cover the entire lifespan of the vehicle, and replacement costs can range from $5,000 to $20,000.

Recent data, however, indicates that EV batteries are outperforming early expectations. Aging occurs through two mechanisms: calendar aging, where batteries lose capacity over time regardless of use, and cyclical aging, which is influenced by charging and discharging cycles. The degradation pattern resembles an "S curve," characterized by an initial rapid decline, followed by a prolonged stabilization, and culminating in a more pronounced decline towards the end of the battery's life.

Research from Recurrent, which analyzes data from over 30,000 EV drivers, suggests that the initial drop in battery health is less severe than previously feared, and the significant decline at the end of life takes considerably longer to occur. This is supported by observations from Adam George at Cox Automotive, who notes a substantial increase in the availability of used EVs, reflecting the growing production and suggesting that battery health is not deteriorating as rapidly as anticipated in the early years of ownership.

business.title: Oil prices jump and shares fall as conflict escalates - BBC

elementary.en: Subitha Subramaniam said that high oil prices can lead to higher prices for food and other goods. This will cause inflation to increase.
elementary.ko: 수비타 수브라마니암은 높은 유가가 음식과 다른 상품의 가격을 높일 수 있다고 말했습니다. 이것은 인플레이션을 증가시킬 것입니다.

middle.en: Subitha Subramaniam, a chief economist at Sarasin & Partners, warned that high oil prices could lead to increased costs in other areas. This includes essential items like food and agricultural products, as well as industrial commodities. As a result, these rising costs could contribute significantly to inflation.
middle.ko: 사라신 & 파트너스의 수석 경제학자인 수비타 수브라마니암은 높은 유가가 다른 분야의 비용 증가로 이어질 수 있다고 경고했습니다. 여기에는 식품, 농산물 및 산업 원자재와 같은 필수 품목이 포함됩니다. 결과적으로 이러한 비용 상승은 인플레이션에 크게 기여할 수 있습니다.

high.en: Subitha Subramaniam, the chief economist and head of investment strategy at Sarasin & Partners, indicated that prolonged high oil prices could lead to a ripple effect on various sectors, including food, agriculture, and industrial commodities, ultimately exacerbating inflation.
high.ko: 사라신 & 파트너스의 수석 경제학자이자 투자 전략 책임자인 수비타 수브라마니암은 지속적으로 높은 유가가 식품, 농업 및 산업 원자재와 같은 다양한 분야에 연쇄적인 영향을 미쳐 궁극적으로 인플레이션을 악화시킬 수 있다고 언급했습니다.

business.title: Stock market today: Dow futures fall 300 points as Trump hints at Iran sanctions relief - Fortune

elementary.en: U.S. stock futures fell as investors reacted to the conflict between the U.S. and Iran, with oil prices rising sharply. The situation has caused shipping disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz, which could lead to higher oil prices.
elementary.ko: 미국 주식 선물이 미국과 이란 간의 갈등에 반응하여 하락했고, 유가가 급등했습니다. 이 상황은 호르무즈 해협의 선박 운송 중단을 초래하여 유가 상승으로 이어질 수 있습니다.

middle.en: U.S. stock futures fell as investors reacted to the ongoing conflict between the U.S. and Iran, with President Trump warning of more casualties and the FBI investigating a mass shooting in Texas. Oil prices surged due to fears that Iran might close the Strait of Hormuz, a crucial route for global oil supply, after reports of missile strikes on oil tankers. Shipping companies are suspending operations in the region, raising concerns about the impact on oil supplies and prices, which could potentially reach $100 per barrel.
middle.ko: 미국 주식 선물은 미국과 이란 간의 갈등에 대한 반응으로 하락했으며, 트럼프 대통령은 더 많은 사상자가 발생할 것이라고 경고하고 FBI는 텍사스의 총격 사건을 조사하고 있습니다. 이란이 세계 석유 공급의 중요한 경로인 호르무즈 해협을 차단할 수 있다는 우려로 인해 유가가 급등했으며, 석유 탱커에 대한 미사일 공격 보고가 있었습니다. 해양 운송 회사들은 이 지역에서의 운영을 중단하고 있으며, 이는 석유 공급과 가격에 미치는 영향에 대한 우려를 키우고 있으며, 유가는 배럴당 100달러에 이를 수 있습니다.

high.en:
U.S. stock futures indicated a risk-averse sentiment on Sunday evening as investors reacted to the U.S.-Israeli bombardment of Iran over the weekend. This selloff followed President Donald Trump's warning of likely increased casualties from Operation Epic Fury, alongside an FBI investigation into a mass shooting in Texas, which is being treated as a potential act of terrorism.

Trump has suggested that the conflict with Iran may be prolonged, emphasizing regime change as a goal. He stated on social media that the bombing will continue "as long as necessary to achieve our objective of PEACE THROUGHOUT THE MIDDLE EAST AND, INDEED, THE WORLD!" However, he also expressed to The New York Times his willingness to lift sanctions on Iran if a new leadership, succeeding the late Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei, proves to be a pragmatic partner.

Futures for the Dow Jones industrial average dropped 353 points (0.72%), while S&P 500 and Nasdaq futures fell by 0.68% and 0.79%, respectively. In the oil market, U.S. oil futures surged 5.6% to $70.77 per barrel, with Brent crude rising 5.9% to $77.15 after an earlier spike exceeding 8%. Reports indicated that Brent prices had jumped 10% in over-the-counter trading to around $80 per barrel.

Iran's oil production was 4.7 million barrels per day last year, constituting 4.4% of global supplies. The primary concern lies in the potential for Iran to close the Strait of Hormuz, a critical passage for one-fifth of the world's oil exports. Analysts warn that such a closure could drive prices to $100 per barrel.

The Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps has reportedly warned ships against passage through the strait and claimed responsibility for missile strikes on three oil tankers. This has already resulted in a freeze on ship traffic, with hundreds of tankers carrying oil and liquid natural gas anchoring near the Strait of Hormuz. Shipping companies, including Maersk, have suspended all vessel crossings through the strait as a precaution.

The closure of the strait would significantly impact Asian economies, which are major oil importers reliant on open supply routes. Alan Gelder, a senior VP at Wood Mackenzie, estimated that it could take weeks for export flows to resume, even under optimistic conditions of cooperation from Tehran. Until then, the outlook for oil prices remains precarious with substantial upside risks.

entertainment.title: Kimora Lee Simmons Wants To Drop Russell's Last Name (HOLD) - TMZ

elementary.en: Kimora Lee Simmons wants to change her name to Kimora Lee. She is doing this to make her life simpler after her divorces.
elementary.ko: 키모라 리 시몬스는 이름을 키모라 리로 바꾸고 싶어합니다. 그녀는 이혼 후 삶을 더 간단하게 만들기 위해 이렇게 하고 있습니다.

middle.en: Kimora Lee Simmons wants to simplify her name by dropping the last names of her ex-husbands, including Russell Simmons. She has filed legal paperwork to change her name from Kimora Lee Simmons-Leissner to Kimora Lee for easier record-keeping. Kimora has been independent for many years and prefers to be known simply as Kimora Lee.
middle.ko: 키모라 리 시몬스는 러셀 시몬스를 포함한 전 남편들의 성을 버리고 이름을 간단하게 하고 싶어합니다. 그녀는 기록 관리를 쉽게 하기 위해 자신의 이름을 키모라 리 시몬스-라이스너에서 키모라 리로 변경하는 법적 서류를 제출했습니다. 키모라는 수년 동안 독립적으로 활동해 왔으며, 단순히 키모라 리로 알려지기를 원합니다.

high.en:
Kimora Lee Simmons is seeking to simplify her name by officially dropping the surnames of her former spouses, including Russell Simmons. According to legal documents obtained by TMZ, she has filed to change her name from Kimora Lee Simmons-Leissner to Kimora Lee. The rationale behind this decision is to achieve "consolidation of records and names used in different documents." 

Kimora married Russell Simmons in 1998, divorced in 2009, and retained his surname. She later married Tim Leissner in 2014, adopting the hyphenated name Kimora Lee Simmons-Leissner. Following their separation in 2022, she has opted to revert to a simpler name. Originally born Kimora Lee Perkins in St. Louis, she appears to prefer the name Kimora Lee moving forward. Sources indicate that Kimora has been independently managing her own foundation for several years.

entertainment.title: Actor Awards: Ryan Coogler Becomes First Person To Direct Two Cast Ensemble Winners With ‘Sinners’ Victory - Deadline

elementary.en: Ryan Coogler is the first filmmaker to win two Actor Awards for directing, first for Black Panther and now for Sinners. The cast of Sinners, which includes Michael B. Jordan, received praise for their performance and the project was recognized as "anointed."
elementary.ko: 라이언 쿠글러는 블랙 팬서와 신서스에서 감독으로서 두 번의 배우상을 수상한 최초의 영화 제작자입니다. 마이클 B. 조던이 포함된 신서스의 출연진은 그들의 연기에 대한 찬사를 받았고, 이 프로젝트는 "신성한" 것으로 인정받았습니다.

middle.en: Ryan Coogler made history by being the first filmmaker to direct two cast ensembles that won the Actor Award, with his latest film Sinners winning at the 32nd Annual Actor Awards. The cast, including Michael B. Jordan and Delroy Lindo, expressed their gratitude for being part of this "anointed" project, highlighting the emotional investment they brought to their roles. Sinners is also nominated for a record 16 Oscars this month, competing against other notable films.
middle.ko: 라이언 쿠글러는 그의 최신 영화 '신자들'이 제32회 배우상에서 수상하면서 두 개의 출연진이 배우상을 수상한 최초의 감독이 되었습니다. 마이클 B. 조던과 델로이 린도 등을 포함한 출연진은 이 "신성한" 프로젝트의 일원이 된 것에 대한 감사를 표현하며 그들의 역할에 대한 감정적 투자를 강조했습니다. '신자들'은 또한 이번 달에 16개의 오스카 후보에 올라 있으며, 다른 주목할 만한 영화들과 경쟁하고 있습니다.

high.en:
Ryan Coogler, the filmmaker behind "Sinners," has made history by becoming the first director to lead two ensemble casts to victory at the Actor Awards. This achievement follows his 2018 win for "Black Panther," which also featured Michael B. Jordan. 

Although Coogler did not join his cast on stage, which included award winners such as Miles Caton, Buddy Guy, Jayme Lawson, Delroy Lindo, Omar Miller, Wunmi Mosaku, Jack O’Connell, Hailee Steinfeld, and Michael B. Jordan, Lindo represented the group, expressing their gratitude for being part of what he described as an "anointed" project. He emphasized the heartfelt contributions of the cast to the film and their appreciation for the recognition.

"Sinners" is nominated for a record 16 Oscars this month and faced competition from other films, including "One Battle After Another," "Frankenstein," "Hamnet," and "Marty Supreme." Previous winners of the Actor Award for Outstanding Performance by a Cast in a Motion Picture include notable films such as "The Birdcage," "Parasite," and "Oppenheimer." 

Additionally, Michael B. Jordan secured the Actor trophy, marking a significant moment in the Best Actor category, where Timothée Chalamet and Wagner Moura had previously won at other prestigious awards.

entertainment.title: Your daily horoscope: March 2, 2026 - The Globe and Mail

elementary.en: Today is your birthday, and you will feel a boost of energy and demand from others. Be careful with your money and focus on making necessary changes in your relationships.
elementary.ko: 오늘은 당신의 생일이며, 에너지가 넘치고 다른 사람들의 요구가 많아질 것입니다. 돈을 조심하고 관계에서 필요한 변화를 만드는 데 집중하세요.

middle.en: If today is your birthday, you will feel a surge of energy and have many opportunities to showcase your talents. However, be careful with your finances and avoid overspending, as the lunar eclipse warns of potential financial issues. Additionally, focus on your own needs and be cautious about taking on new responsibilities, as others may demand a lot from you in the coming days.
middle.ko: 오늘이 당신의 생일이라면, 에너지가 넘치고 당신의 재능을 보여줄 기회가 많을 것입니다. 그러나 재정에 주의하고 과도한 지출을 피하세요. 월식이 재정 문제의 가능성을 경고하고 있습니다. 또한, 다른 사람들이 당신에게 많은 것을 요구할 수 있으므로 자신의 필요에 집중하고 새로운 책임을 맡는 데 신중해야 합니다.

high.en:
If today is your birthday, the transition of Mars into your sign will energize you, presenting numerous opportunities for personal and professional growth. You will be in high demand socially and at work, but prioritize your own interests. 

Focus on managing routine tasks effectively, as you will be under scrutiny. Maintain composure and avoid complaints about your workload. While you can accomplish a significant amount today, approach your tasks with a strategic plan, opting for consistent, smaller efforts rather than overwhelming yourself with large leaps.

In the next 24 to 48 hours, expect increased demands from others due to the lunar eclipse's influence. Strive to meet these demands, but be cautious not to overextend yourself. Be wary of new opportunities for advancement; assess whether they will lead to excessive work with minimal reward, and be prepared to decline if necessary.

The upcoming lunar eclipse also signals a need for financial caution. If you continue your current spending habits, you risk financial strain and potential conflict with loved ones. Additionally, relationship dynamics will come to the forefront, necessitating changes that involve not just you but others as well.

If you find yourself fearing the worst without justification, consider moderating your imagination and distancing yourself from persistently negative individuals, as they may hinder your well-being. Remember, others' problems are not your responsibility; maintaining emotional distance may be the best way to assist them.

A project you have been developing is beginning to coalesce, though you may not receive recognition from colleagues, as your success could inadvertently highlight their shortcomings. As challenges arise, elevate your performance to demonstrate your capability and commitment. 

For those born under Aquarius (Jan. 21 - Feb. 19), if you are presented with new responsibilities today, embrace them wholeheartedly and exert maximum effort, regardless of your interest level, to dispel any doubts from competitors. The impending lunar eclipse will also impact partnerships, signaling a time for reflection and potential change.

entertainment.title: Lindsay Lohan, Family 'Safe' Amid Escalating Conflict in Middle East - TMZ

elementary.en: Lindsay Lohan and her family are safe after strikes on Dubai by Iran. She has lived in Dubai since 2015 and enjoys the peace it brings.
elementary.ko: 린제이 로한과 그녀의 가족은 이란의 두바이 공격 이후 안전합니다. 그녀는 2015년부터 두바이에 살았으며 그곳에서의 평화를 즐깁니다.

middle.en: Lindsay Lohan and her family are safe after recent strikes on Dubai by Iran. She has been living in Dubai since 2015 and enjoys the peace it offers away from the paparazzi. The situation in Iran has escalated following attacks by the United States and Israel, leading to significant developments in the region.
middle.ko: 린제이 로한과 그녀의 가족은 이란의 최근 두바이에 대한 공격 이후 안전합니다. 그녀는 2015년부터 두바이에 살고 있으며, 파파라치에서 벗어난 평화로운 생활을 즐깁니다. 미국과 이스라엘의 공격 이후 이란의 상황이 심각해지면서 지역에서 중요한 사건들이 발생하고 있습니다.

high.en: Lindsay Lohan and her family are reported to be safe following recent strikes on Dubai by Iran, according to sources cited by TMZ. The actress, her husband Bader Shammas, and their son Luai are unharmed. Lohan has resided in Dubai since 2015 and began her relationship with Shammas in 2020; they became engaged in 2021, married the following year, and welcomed their son in 2022. Lohan, who recently graced the cover of Vogue Arabia, has expressed her appreciation for life in Dubai, highlighting the tranquility and privacy it offers away from paparazzi. The strikes by Iran were reportedly retaliatory actions following attacks by the United States and Israel on Iranian nuclear facilities and strategic sites. Additionally, Iranian state media confirmed the death of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, the Supreme Leader of Iran from 1981 until his passing.

entertainment.title: Elimination Chamber draws small crowd, big pops at local cinema - Cageside Seats

elementary.en: I went to see WWE’s Elimination Chamber at Regal Cinemas with about 40 fans. Everyone had fun cheering for the wrestlers, and I enjoyed talking with new friends after the show.
elementary.ko: 저는 약 40명의 팬들과 함께 Regal Cinemas에서 WWE의 Elimination Chamber를 보러 갔습니다. 모두가 레슬러를 응원하며 즐거운 시간을 보냈고, 쇼가 끝난 후 새로운 친구들과 이야기하는 것도 즐거웠습니다.

middle.en: I have been a fan of pro wrestling since 1985 and recently attended WWE's Elimination Chamber event at Regal Cinemas in El Cajon, California. The atmosphere was lively as fans cheered for their favorite wrestlers, especially during exciting matches like the women's Elimination Chamber and the men's main event. After the show, I enjoyed discussing wrestling with new friends, and we all agreed to return for WrestleMania in April.
middle.ko: 저는 1985년부터 프로 레슬링 팬이었고 최근 캘리포니아 엘 카혼의 레갈 시네마에서 WWE의 엘리미네이션 챔버 이벤트에 참석했습니다. 팬들이 좋아하는 레슬러를 응원하며 분위기가 활기찼고, 특히 여성 엘리미네이션 챔버와 남성 메인 이벤트에서 흥미진진한 경기가 있었습니다. 쇼가 끝난 후, 저는 새로운 친구들과 레슬링에 대해 이야기하며 즐거운 시간을 보냈고, 모두 4월의 레슬매니아에 다시 가기로 합의했습니다.

high.en:
M. Gomez, a seasoned follower of professional wrestling since 1985 and a former news and sports radio anchor in San Diego, offers a distinctive viewpoint on sports entertainment. Recently, Gomez attended WWE's Elimination Chamber event at Regal Cinemas in El Cajon, California, where approximately 40 fans gathered. Initially attending alone due to his wife's prior commitments, he observed a reserved atmosphere that gradually transformed into enthusiastic engagement as the event progressed.

The show commenced with the women’s Elimination Chamber match, where Raquel Rodriguez garnered significant support after a powerful slam. The mood lightened further when Rhea Ripley triumphed over Tiffany Stratton. The Women's Intercontinental title match captivated the audience, particularly when AJ Lee unexpectedly dethroned champion Becky Lynch, eliciting applause. Conversely, CM Punk's victory over Finn Bálor received a mixed reaction, with some fans expressing discontent towards the booking decisions.

The event's momentum faltered during Danhausen's debut, which was met with a blend of silence and boos. However, the main event, the men’s Chamber match, reignited excitement, especially with Trick Williams' performance, which drew enthusiastic chants. Logan Paul faced significant backlash after eliminating three opponents, but the crowd erupted when Seth Rollins thwarted his WrestleMania aspirations. The climax saw Randy Orton pin Cody Rhodes with an RKO, prompting an ecstatic response reminiscent of a championship victory.

Post-event, Gomez reconnected with friends and engaged in discussions about wrestling storylines and ticket prices, with a consensus that LA Knight's character may be faltering. Despite some audio issues, the cinematic experience remains his preferred viewing method. The sense of community among fans was a highlight, with many expressing intentions to return for WrestleMania in April, a sentiment Gomez shares.

general.title: Live updates: Oil tankers and refineries under attack as US and Israel exchange strikes with Iran and war widens - Associated Press News

elementary.en: Add AP News to see more stories on Google. Israel and the U.S. are attacking Iran, and the conflict may last for several weeks.
elementary.ko: AP 뉴스를 추가하여 Google에서 더 많은 이야기를 보세요. 이스라엘과 미국이 이란을 공격하고 있으며, 갈등은 몇 주 동안 계속될 수 있습니다.

middle.en: The United States and Israel have launched a significant military campaign against Iran, which is expected to last several weeks. In response, Iran and its allies have targeted Israel and critical energy sites. This escalating conflict has led to increased oil prices, stranded airline passengers, and a commitment from U.S. allies to assist in countering Iranian threats.
middle.ko: 미국과 이스라엘은 몇 주 동안 지속될 것으로 예상되는 이란에 대한 대규모 군사 작전을 시작했습니다. 이에 대한 응답으로 이란과 그 동맹국들은 이스라엘과 중요한 에너지 시설을 공격했습니다. 이 격화된 갈등은 유가 상승, 발이 묶인 항공 승객, 이란의 위협에 대응하기 위한 미국 동맹국들의 지원 약속으로 이어졌습니다.

high.en:
Add AP News as your preferred source on Google to access more of our stories.

Today's live updates have concluded. For ongoing coverage of the conflict with Iran, please follow our news.

On Monday, Israel and the United States launched a significant military campaign against Iran, which U.S. President Donald Trump indicated could extend over several weeks. In response, Tehran and its allies targeted Israel, Gulf states, and key energy infrastructure worldwide.

The escalation of attacks, including the assassination of Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, coupled with the absence of a clear exit strategy, suggests a potential for a protracted conflict with extensive implications. Regions in the Middle East, such as Dubai, have experienced incoming fire; hundreds of thousands of airline passengers are stranded internationally; oil prices have surged; and U.S. allies have committed to countering Iranian missile and drone threats.

Trump stated that military operations are expected to last four to five weeks, although he is ready to extend the duration if necessary.

general.title: The Iran war makes it official – America is breaking with Europe - New Statesman

elementary.en: The Maga movement believes that Europe has not acted seriously during the current crisis, especially regarding the situation in Iran and Ukraine. This has caused a breakdown in the relationship between the US and Europe, with many Americans feeling that their allies are not supporting them.
elementary.ko: Maga 운동은 유럽이 현재 위기, 특히 이란과 우크라이나 상황에서 진지하게 행동하지 않았다고 믿습니다. 이는 미국과 유럽 간의 관계 단절을 초래했으며, 많은 미국인들이 그들의 동맹국이 자신들을 지지하지 않고 있다고 느끼고 있습니다.

middle.en: The Maga movement believes that Europe has failed to act seriously during a crisis, particularly regarding the conflict in Ukraine and the situation in Iran. Many in the US feel that their European allies have not shown enough support, leading to growing frustration and a breakdown in the transatlantic relationship. Key issues include differing views on military involvement, respect for international law, and the perception that Europe is not prioritizing US interests.
middle.ko: Maga 운동은 유럽이 위기 상황에서 진지하게 행동하지 않았다고 믿고 있으며, 특히 우크라이나와 이란 상황에 대해 그렇습니다. 많은 미국인들은 유럽 동맹국들이 충분한 지원을 보여주지 않았다고 느끼며, 이는 대서양 관계의 악화로 이어지고 있습니다. 주요 문제는 군사 개입에 대한 상반된 견해, 국제법에 대한 존중 부족, 그리고 유럽이 미국의 이익을 우선시하지 않는다는 인식입니다.

high.en:
The Maga movement perceives its concerns regarding Europe as validated following recent military actions by the US and Israel against Iran. In response, Ursula von der Leyen, President of the EU Commission, announced a special "security college" meeting, which has been interpreted by Maga supporters as indicative of Europe's unseriousness on the global stage. The ongoing war has exacerbated tensions in the transatlantic relationship, with mixed reactions from European nations inciting frustration in Washington. Prominent figures, including Senator Lindsey Graham and former White House Press Secretary Sean Spicer, have criticized Europe's lack of support for Iran, while others, like columnist Marc Thiessen, have declared the "special relationship" between the US and UK effectively over.

The Maga movement's discontent stems from several factors. Firstly, many within the Trump administration view the conflict in Ukraine as peripheral to US national interests, leading to a perception that European efforts to counter Russian aggression are inconsequential. Secondly, there is a sense of disrespect from the US towards Europe, exemplified by Trump's comments on NATO and military operations. Lastly, a fundamental disagreement over international law has emerged, with the EU valuing its regulatory power and the Trump administration dismissing international law as irrelevant, which has strained military cooperation and undermined the historical ties between the US and Europe.

general.title: How long do electric vehicle batteries actually last? - NPR

elementary.en: Electric vehicle (EV) batteries are designed to last longer than traditional car batteries, but they do lose energy over time. New data shows that EV batteries are lasting longer than expected, with less severe initial decline than previously thought.
elementary.ko: 전기차(EV) 배터리는 전통적인 자동차 배터리보다 더 오래 지속되도록 설계되었지만 시간이 지남에 따라 에너지를 잃습니다. 새로운 데이터에 따르면 EV 배터리는 예상보다 더 오래 지속되고 있으며, 초기 감소가 이전에 생각했던 것보다 덜 심각하다는 것을 보여줍니다.

middle.en: Electric vehicle (EV) batteries are designed to last longer than traditional batteries, but their lifespan can vary. Initially, experts estimated that EV batteries would last around seven years, causing concern for potential buyers. However, recent data shows that many EV batteries are lasting longer than expected, with a gradual decline in performance rather than a rapid drop-off.
middle.ko: 전기차(EV) 배터리는 전통적인 배터리보다 더 오래 지속되도록 설계되었지만, 그 수명은 다양할 수 있습니다. 처음에는 전문가들이 EV 배터리가 약 7년 정도 지속될 것이라고 추정하여 잠재 구매자들에게 우려를 주었습니다. 그러나 최근 데이터에 따르면 많은 EV 배터리가 예상보다 더 오래 지속되고 있으며, 성능 저하가 급격하지 않고 점진적으로 이루어지고 있습니다.

high.en:
The longevity of electric vehicle (EV) batteries has been a topic of concern since the introduction of modern EVs fifteen years ago. Initial predictions suggested that these lithium-ion batteries would last around seven years, which raised apprehensions among potential buyers, especially considering the average lifespan of a conventional car exceeds twelve years. While warranties for EV batteries exist, they often do not cover the entire lifespan of the vehicle, and replacement costs can range from $5,000 to $20,000.

Recent data, however, indicates that EV batteries are outlasting these early estimates. Lithium-ion batteries experience two types of aging: calendar aging, where they degrade over time regardless of use, and cyclical aging, which occurs through repeated charging and discharging. This degradation follows an "S curve," characterized by an initial rapid decline, a prolonged plateau, and a subsequent sharp decline towards the end of the battery's life.

Research from Recurrent, which analyzes data from over 30,000 EV drivers, suggests that the initial decline in battery health is less severe than previously feared, and the end-of-life deterioration takes significantly longer to manifest. This is corroborated by observations from Adam George at Cox Automotive, who notes a substantial increase in the availability of used EVs at auctions, indicating that battery health is not deteriorating as rapidly as anticipated in the early years of vehicle ownership.

general.title: Kimora Lee Simmons Wants To Drop Russell's Last Name (HOLD) - TMZ

elementary.en: Kimora Lee Simmons wants to change her name to just Kimora Lee. She is doing this to make her life simpler after her divorces.
elementary.ko: 키모라 리 시몬스는 이름을 단순히 키모라 리로 바꾸고 싶어합니다. 그녀는 이혼 후 삶을 더 간단하게 만들기 위해 이렇게 하고 있습니다.

middle.en: Kimora Lee Simmons wants to simplify her name by dropping the last names of her ex-husbands, including Russell Simmons. She has filed legal paperwork to change her name from Kimora Lee Simmons-Leissner to Kimora Lee for easier record-keeping. Kimora, who was born Kimora Lee Perkins, is looking to shorten her name after her separation from Tim Leissner in 2022.
middle.ko: 키모라 리 시몬스는 러셀 시몬스를 포함한 전 남편들의 성을 버리고 이름을 단순화하고 싶어합니다. 그녀는 기록 관리를 쉽게 하기 위해 이름을 키모라 리 시몬스-라이스너에서 키모라 리로 변경하는 법적 문서를 제출했습니다. 2022년 팀 라이스너와의 이혼 후, 키모라는 자신의 이름을 줄이려 하고 있습니다.

high.en:
Kimora Lee Simmons is seeking to simplify her name by officially dropping the surnames of her former spouses, including Russell Simmons. According to legal documents obtained by TMZ, she has filed to change her name from Kimora Lee Simmons-Leissner to Kimora Lee. The motivation behind this change is to facilitate the "consolidation of records and names used in different documents." 

Kimora married Russell Simmons in 1998, and after their divorce in 2009, she retained his surname. She later married Tim Leissner in 2014, adopting the hyphenated surname Simmons-Leissner, but they separated in 2022. Originally born Kimora Lee Perkins in St. Louis, she now prefers to simplify her name to Kimora Lee. Sources indicate that Kimora has been independently managing her own foundation for many years.

health.title: Column | Baggies, retainers and more: 5 microplastics questions, answered - The Washington Post

elementary.en: Microplastics are tiny plastic particles found in our bodies, and scientists are still studying their effects on health. While we can't yet remove them from our bodies, we can reduce new exposure by being careful with how we use plastic.
elementary.ko: 미세플라스틱은 우리 몸에서 발견되는 작은 플라스틱 입자이며, 과학자들은 그 건강에 미치는 영향을 여전히 연구하고 있습니다. 우리는 아직 몸에서 그것들을 제거할 수는 없지만, 플라스틱 사용에 주의함으로써 새로운 노출을 줄일 수 있습니다.

middle.en: Microplastics are tiny plastic particles found in various parts of the human body, and while some studies suggest they may increase health risks, we still do not know how to remove them effectively. Research indicates that our bodies can eliminate larger microplastics through feces, but smaller particles pose a greater risk as they may be absorbed into the body. To reduce new exposure to microplastics, it is important to be cautious about how we store and heat food in plastic containers.
middle.ko: 미세플라스틱은 인체의 여러 부분에서 발견되는 작은 플라스틱 입자로, 일부 연구에서는 건강 위험을 증가시킬 수 있다고 제안하지만, 이를 효과적으로 제거하는 방법은 아직 모릅니다. 연구에 따르면, 우리의 몸은 더 큰 미세플라스틱을 대변을 통해 배출할 수 있지만, 더 작은 입자는 더 큰 위험을 초래할 수 있습니다. 미세플라스틱에 대한 새로운 노출을 줄이기 위해서는 플라스틱 용기에 음식을 저장하고 가열하는 방법에 주의하는 것이 중요합니다.

high.en:
After recent coverage on microplastics, numerous readers submitted follow-up inquiries, primarily concerning practical implications, such as the safety of using plastic water pitchers, retainers, and toothbrushes. The overarching question pertains to the presence of microplastics in our bodies and potential removal strategies. Currently, there is no established method for eliminating microplastics, and research in this area is still nascent.

Microplastics have been identified in various human tissues, including blood, lungs, liver, placenta, breast milk, and even the brain. While some researchers have raised concerns about the methodologies of certain studies that may exaggerate findings, the prevailing literature indicates a trend of accumulation. A significant study published in the New England Journal of Medicine in 2024 highlighted that patients with asymptomatic coronary artery disease exhibited microplastics in arterial plaques, correlating their presence with an increased risk of heart attack, stroke, and mortality over approximately three years. However, this association does not establish causation, and further investigation into the underlying mechanisms is warranted.

Encouragingly, the body does eliminate some microplastics naturally, particularly larger particles, which are likely excreted through feces. Concerns remain regarding smaller particles, with estimates suggesting that around 30% of those between 1 and 10 microns may be absorbed by the intestine, while nanoplastics may accumulate more readily.

To mitigate new exposures, it is crucial to address common questions regarding plastic use. For instance, while microwaving food in plastic is known to increase microplastic release, the implications of storing frozen food in plastic bags are less clear. Previous studies indicate that heating accelerates microplastic leaching, and although refrigeration also contributes to this process over time, freezing may present a different risk profile that requires further exploration.

health.title: Semaglutide May Reverse Damage Caused by Osteoarthritis, Study Suggests - ScienceAlert

elementary.en: Semaglutide may help repair joint damage from osteoarthritis, a common type of arthritis, by changing how cartilage cells produce energy. This effect happens even without weight loss, making semaglutide a potential new treatment for joint health.
elementary.ko: 세마글루타이드는 관절 세포가 에너지를 생산하는 방식을 변화시켜 일반적인 관절염인 골관절염의 관절 손상을 회복하는 데 도움을 줄 수 있습니다. 이 효과는 체중 감소 없이도 발생하므로 세마글루타이드는 관절 건강을 위한 새로운 치료법이 될 수 있습니다.

middle.en: Medical researchers have found that semaglutide, a drug commonly used for diabetes and weight loss, may help reverse tissue damage caused by osteoarthritis. The drug works by reprogramming the metabolism of cartilage cells, enabling them to produce more energy and protect joints, independent of weight loss. In studies with both mice and humans, semaglutide reduced pain and cartilage degeneration, suggesting it has a significant impact on joint health beyond just alleviating symptoms.
middle.ko: 의학 연구자들은 당뇨병 및 체중 감소에 일반적으로 사용되는 약물인 세마글루타이드가 골관절염으로 인한 조직 손상을 되돌리는 데 도움이 될 수 있음을 발견했습니다. 이 약물은 연골 세포의 대사를 재프로그램하여 더 많은 에너지를 생산하고 체중 감소와 관계없이 관절을 보호하는 방식으로 작용합니다. 쥐와 인간을 대상으로 한 연구에서 세마글루타이드는 통증과 연골 퇴화를 줄여 주며, 증상 완화 이상의 관절 건강에 중요한 영향을 미친다는 것을 시사합니다.

high.en:
Medical researchers have identified that semaglutide, a drug commonly used for treating type 2 diabetes and aiding weight loss, may have the potential to reverse tissue damage associated with osteoarthritis, the most prevalent form of arthritis globally. The study indicates that semaglutide protects joint health in mice through a mechanism unrelated to weight loss; it reprograms the metabolism of cells responsible for synthesizing and maintaining healthy cartilage, thereby enhancing their energy production.

The research team, comprising members from both China and the US, emphasizes that this discovery not only highlights semaglutide's potential as an effective treatment for metabolic osteoarthritis but also reveals a repair mechanism that operates independently of weight loss. In addition to animal studies, a randomized human trial was conducted to evaluate semaglutide's effects on pain, mobility, and tissue degradation in individuals suffering from osteoarthritis and obesity.

Osteoarthritis progression is significantly influenced by obesity, metabolic disorders such as diabetes, and inflammation, which can impact various tissues, including bone and cartilage. Semaglutide functions by mimicking the natural hormone glucagon-like peptide 1 (GLP-1), which stimulates insulin release and suppresses appetite. While weight loss is typically associated with reduced stress on joints, existing osteoarthritis treatments primarily provide symptomatic relief without addressing the root cause.

In contrast, semaglutide appears to fundamentally enhance joint health. In both mice and humans with obesity and osteoarthritis, treatment resulted in reduced pain and less cartilage degeneration, along with fewer bone spurs and milder lesions in joint membranes. Comparative analysis of cartilage from treated and untreated mice revealed significant changes in the expression of nearly 8,300 proteins. Notably, a "pair-feeding" control group that consumed the same amount of food as the semaglutide-treated mice did not experience the same protective effects on cartilage, indicating that the benefits of semaglutide are not solely dependent on weight loss.

The primary biological pathway influenced by semaglutide involves the "GLP-1R-AMPK-PFKFB3 axis," a series of compounds that regulate energy production in various cells. By activating this enzymatic cascade, semaglutide enhances the metabolic efficiency of chondrocytes, the cells found in healthy cartilage, thereby promoting their survival and function.

health.title: Your evening habits might be slowing your metabolism: 5 must follow habits that will boost your digestion and help with weight loss - The Times of India

elementary.en: Eating late at night can make it harder for your body to stay healthy and manage weight. Changing small habits in the evening can help your body work better.
elementary.ko: 밤늦게 먹는 것은 몸이 건강하게 유지하고 체중을 관리하는 것을 더 어렵게 만들 수 있습니다. 저녁에 작은 습관을 바꾸면 몸이 더 잘 작동하도록 도울 수 있습니다.

middle.en: Evenings play a crucial role in determining weight changes over time, as the body continues to function even after 7 pm. Eating heavy meals and using screens late at night can disrupt digestion and metabolism, leading to weight gain and health issues. Adopting small changes in evening habits can align better with the body's natural processes and improve overall health.
middle.ko: 저녁 시간은 시간이 지남에 따라 체중 변화에 중요한 역할을 하며, 7시 이후에도 몸은 계속 기능합니다. 늦은 밤에 무거운 음식을 먹고 화면을 사용하는 것은 소화와 신진대사를 방해하여 체중 증가와 건강 문제를 초래할 수 있습니다. 저녁 습관에서 작은 변화를 채택하면 몸의 자연스러운 과정과 더 잘 일치하여 전반적인 건강을 개선할 수 있습니다.

high.en: Evening habits significantly influence long-term weight management, as the body remains active in digestion, cellular repair, hormone regulation, and blood sugar control after 7 PM. However, this period is often compromised by heavy meals, screen time, stress, and late nights, which can hinder these essential processes. Metabolism encompasses more than just calorie expenditure; it involves the body's efficiency in converting food into energy, managing insulin levels, supporting gut microbiota, and preserving muscle mass. Research from BMC Public Health highlights a correlation between rising obesity rates in India and late-night eating, sedentary lifestyles, and inadequate sleep. Additionally, findings from the National Institutes of Health indicate that late-night eating can elevate hunger hormones and decrease calorie expenditure the following day. Implementing minor adjustments to evening routines can yield significant health benefits by aligning with the body's natural rhythms. Here are five effective habits to consider.

health.title: FDA-Approved Seizure Drug May Stop Alzheimer’s Before It Starts - SciTechDaily

elementary.en: Levetiracetam helps by stopping the creation of harmful amyloid beta peptides. This is different from treatments that remove plaques that are already there.
elementary.ko: 레베티라세탐은 해로운 아밀로이드 베타 펩타이드의 생성을 막아줍니다. 이것은 이미 있는 플라크를 제거하는 치료와 다릅니다.

middle.en: Levetiracetam is a treatment that works differently from others. Instead of removing existing plaques, it stops the creation of harmful amyloid beta peptides. This approach helps prevent the formation of plaques in the brain.
middle.ko: 레베티라세탐은 다른 치료법과는 다르게 작용합니다. 기존의 플라크를 제거하는 대신, 해로운 아밀로이드 베타 펩타이드의 생성을 막습니다. 이러한 접근은 뇌에서 플라크 형성을 예방하는 데 도움을 줍니다.

high.en: Levetiracetam operates through a distinct mechanism compared to treatments aimed at eliminating existing plaques; it inhibits the initial production of toxic amyloid beta peptides.
high.ko: 레베티라세탐은 기존의 플라크를 제거하는 데 초점을 맞춘 치료법과는 다른 방식으로 작용합니다. 이는 독성 아밀로이드 베타 펩타이드의 초기 생성을 차단합니다.

science.title: Watch the 'blood moon' total lunar eclipse in the early hours of March 3 with these free livestreams - Space

elementary.en: A blood moon will be visible on March 3, and you can watch it online through various livestreams. People in many countries can enjoy this special lunar eclipse, and if you can't see it in person, there are free streams available.
elementary.ko: 3월 3일에 블러드 문이 보일 것이며, 여러 생중계를 통해 온라인으로 볼 수 있습니다. 많은 나라의 사람들이 이 특별한 월식의 순간을 즐길 수 있으며, 직접 볼 수 없는 경우 무료 스트림이 제공됩니다.

middle.en: On March 3, a "blood moon" total lunar eclipse will be visible to over 3.3 billion people across the Americas, Asia, and Oceania. If you cannot see it due to your location or weather, you can watch the event online through several free YouTube livestreams from places like the U.S., Canada, and Australia. The livestreams will feature expert commentary and real-time views of the eclipse, making it accessible for everyone.
middle.ko: 3월 3일, "블러드 문" 개기 월식이 아메리카, 아시아, 오세아니아의 33억 명 이상에게 보일 것입니다. 만약 당신의 위치나 날씨 때문에 볼 수 없다면, 미국, 캐나다, 호주 등 여러 무료 유튜브 생중계를 통해 온라인으로 이 사건을 볼 수 있습니다. 생중계는 전문가의 해설과 함께 개기 월식의 실시간 모습을 제공하여 모든 사람이 쉽게 접근할 수 있도록 합니다.

high.en:
On March 3, a total lunar eclipse, known as a "blood moon," will captivate stargazers across the U.S. and beyond as Earth's shadow envelops the moon, casting it in a striking coppery red hue. This celestial event will be visible to over 3.3 billion people across the Americas, Asia, and Oceania. For those unable to witness the eclipse in person due to location or weather conditions, several free YouTube livestreams will offer real-time coverage from various locations, including the U.S., Canada, and Australia. 

Key livestreams include:

1. **Time and Date**: Starting at 4:30 a.m. EST (0930 GMT), featuring views from Los Angeles and Western Australia, with commentary from journalist Anne Buckle and astrophysicist Graham Jones.
   
2. **Virtual Telescope Project**: Beginning at 3:30 a.m. EST (0830 GMT), this stream will showcase perspectives from astrophotographers in multiple countries, with commentary by founder Gianluca Masi.

3. **Griffith Observatory**: Streaming from 3:37 a.m. EST (0837 GMT), this observatory will provide extensive coverage of the eclipse phases from its location in Los Angeles.

4. **Auckland Astronomical Society**: Starting at 3:00 a.m. EST (0800 GMT), this stream will offer views of the lunar disk rising in northern New Zealand.

For those interested in capturing their own images of the blood moon, additional resources and tips are available.

science.title: A 'Cosmic Positioning System' in the outer solar system - Phys.org

elementary.en: NASA is working on a new project called the Cosmic Positioning System (CPS) to help measure distances in the universe more accurately. This system will use five satellites in space to improve our understanding of the Hubble Tension, which is the difference in measurements of the universe's expansion rate.
elementary.ko: NASA는 우주에서 거리를 더 정확하게 측정하기 위해 Cosmic Positioning System (CPS)라는 새로운 프로젝트를 진행하고 있습니다. 이 시스템은 우주에 있는 다섯 개의 위성을 사용하여 우주의 팽창 속도 측정에서의 차이인 허블 긴장을 이해하는 데 도움을 줄 것입니다.

middle.en: A new NASA report discusses the Cosmic Positioning System (CPS), which aims to resolve the "Hubble Tension" by using five satellites spread across the solar system. These satellites will measure distances to cosmic objects by tracking the time it takes for signals to travel between them, similar to GPS technology. This mission requires advanced engineering, including large deployable antennas and cooling systems, to function effectively in space.
middle.ko: NASA의 새로운 보고서는 "허블 긴장" 문제를 해결하기 위해 태양계를 가로지르는 다섯 개의 위성을 사용하는 우주 위치 시스템(CPS)에 대해 논의합니다. 이 위성들은 GPS 기술과 유사하게 신호가 서로 간에 이동하는 시간을 추적하여 우주 물체까지의 거리를 측정합니다. 이 임무는 우주에서 효과적으로 작동하기 위해 대형 펼칠 수 있는 안테나와 냉각 시스템을 포함한 고급 공학이 필요합니다.

high.en:
The recent NASA Institute for Advanced Concepts (NIAC) Phase I report introduces the Cosmic Positioning System (CPS) as a potential solution to the ongoing "Hubble Tension" in cosmology, which highlights discrepancies in the measured rate of the universe's expansion. Current measurements yield a Hubble constant of 67.4 km/s/megaparsec using cosmic microwave background radiation, while other methods, such as observations of Cepheid variable stars and supernovae, suggest a value closer to 73 km/s/Mpc. This inconsistency complicates the estimation of distances and ages of cosmological objects.

CPS proposes a network of five satellites strategically positioned throughout the solar system, utilizing a triangulation method akin to that of GPS to measure distances to distant celestial bodies. Each satellite will be equipped with an 8- to 9-meter deployable antenna and will require advanced engineering to maintain operational efficiency, including cooling systems to achieve necessary temperatures. This ambitious infrastructure aims to enhance sensitivity in measurements, potentially resolving the Hubble Tension and advancing our understanding of dark energy and the universe's expansion.
high.ko:
최근 NASA 고급 개념 연구소(NIAC) 1단계 보고서는 우주론에서 진행 중인 "허블 긴장(Hubble Tension)" 문제에 대한 잠재적 해결책으로 우주 위치 시스템(CPS)을 소개합니다. 이는 우주의 팽창 속도 측정에서 발생하는 불일치를 강조합니다. 현재 측정에 따르면 우주 배경 복사를 사용하여 허블 상수는 67.4 km/s/메가파섹으로 나타나지만, 세페이드 변광성 및 초신성 관측과 같은 다른 방법에서는 73 km/s/Mpc에 가까운 값을 제시합니다. 이러한 불일치는 우주 물체의 거리와 나이를 추정하는 데 복잡성을 더합니다.

CPS는 태양계를 가로지르는 다섯 개의 위성을 전략적으로 배치하여 GPS와 유사한 삼각측량 방법을 활용하여 먼 천체까지의 거리를 측정하는 네트워크를 제안합니다. 각 위성은 8~9미터의 펼칠 수 있는 안테나를 장착하고, 작동 효율성을 유지하기 위해 고급 엔지니어링이 필요하며, 필요한 온도를 달성하기 위한 냉각 시스템이 필요합니다. 이 야심찬 인프라는 측정의 민감도를 향상시켜 허블 긴장을 해결하고, 암흑 에너지 및 우주의 팽창에 대한 이해를 발전시키는 것을 목표로 하고 있습니다.

sports.title: Dominiq Ponder, Colorado quarterback, dies at 23 - On3

elementary.en: Colorado quarterback Dominiq Ponder, 23, died in a car accident on Sunday morning. His coach, Deion Sanders, expressed condolences and remembered him as a loved and respected leader.
elementary.ko: 콜로라도 쿼터백 도미니크 폰더(23세)가 일요일 아침에 교통사고로 사망했습니다. 그의 코치인 디온 샌더스는 애도를 표하며 그를 사랑받고 존경받는 리더로 기억했습니다.

middle.en: Dominiq Ponder, a sophomore quarterback for Colorado, tragically died in a car accident at the age of 23. He played for the Buffaloes for two years after transferring from Bethune-Cookman, where he had limited playing time. Head coach Deion Sanders expressed his condolences on Twitter, remembering Ponder as a beloved and respected leader.
middle.ko: 콜로라도의 2학년 쿼터백 도미니크 폰더가 23세의 나이에 교통사고로 비극적으로 사망했습니다. 그는 베순-쿡맨에서 전학한 후 2년 동안 버팔로스에서 뛰었지만 출전 기회는 제한적이었습니다. 디온 샌더스 감독은 트위터를 통해 폰더를 사랑받고 존경받는 리더로 기억하며 애도를 표했습니다.

high.en:
Colorado sophomore quarterback Dominiq Ponder, 23, tragically passed away in a car accident early Sunday morning. Standing at 6-foot-5 and weighing 200 pounds, Ponder had been with the Buffaloes for the past two years. Head coach Deion Sanders confirmed the news on Twitter, expressing his condolences and prayers for Ponder's family, describing him as a beloved and respected leader.

Ponder began his college career at Bethune-Cookman, where he redshirted his first year without seeing game action before transferring to Colorado. He made his collegiate debut in 2025, participating in two games but with limited impact. In his first game against Arizona, he played only three snaps, completing no passes and losing yards on two carries. The following week, he contributed on the kickoff unit against West Virginia.

Before attending Bethune-Cookman, Ponder was an unrated recruit according to Rivals but was recognized as a three-star prospect by 247Sports, ranked as the No. 164 quarterback in his class and the No. 280 overall player from Florida. Hailing from Opa Locka, Florida, he played high school football at Carol City High School and also spent time at Naples High School, where he had a notable sophomore season, throwing for 511 yards and 10 touchdowns while rushing for 356 yards and three scores.

D.J. 스미스는 킹스가 앞으로 나아가기 위한 첫 번째 단계는 지난 패배, 특히 지난 봄 에드먼턴 오일러스에게 당한 아픈 패배를 잊는 것이라고 믿고 있습니다. 그는 이 패배를 인정하는 것이 팀이 자신감과 에너지를 되찾는 데 중요하다고 강조합니다. 새로운 헤드 코치로서 스미스는 선수들에게 새로운 출발을 만들어 주고, 그들이 자신의 능력을 믿고 한때 가졌던 자신감을 회복하도록 격려할 계획입니다.
middle.ko: (번역 준비 중)

high.en:
D.J. Smith emphasizes that the initial step towards progress for the Kings involves letting go of past disappointments, particularly the painful loss to the Edmonton Oilers in the previous season's playoffs. This loss has seemingly lingered, affecting the team's morale and performance this season. Smith believes that acknowledging this past is crucial for moving forward, stating, "That particular loss... somehow carried on to this season and it ends now." 

Having been with the organization since 2024, Smith is not a stranger to the team, having served as an assistant coach before his recent promotion to head coach. In his address to the players, he advocated for a fresh start, focusing on energy and hard work. Forward Adrian Kempe echoed this sentiment, noting that the team currently enters games with hope rather than confidence, particularly at home. Smith aims to restore the confidence and swagger that characterized the team last season, asserting, "Our guys have to take confidence in that we’re a good enough team." The first step, according to Smith, is to rebuild that lost confidence and begin the ascent back to success.

technology.title: AMD will bring its "Ryzen AI" processors to standard desktop PCs for the first time - Ars Technica

elementary.en: AMD has released new Ryzen AI chips for desktop computers that include advanced features for better performance. These chips are designed for business PCs and support special Windows 11 functions, but they are not available for regular consumers.
elementary.ko: AMD는 더 나은 성능을 위한 고급 기능을 포함한 새로운 데스크탑용 Ryzen AI 칩을 출시했습니다. 이 칩은 비즈니스 PC를 위해 설계되었으며 특별한 Windows 11 기능을 지원하지만 일반 소비자에게는 제공되지 않습니다.

middle.en: AMD has introduced its first Ryzen AI desktop processors, which include advanced CPU and GPU architectures along with neural processing units (NPUs) for enhanced performance. These new chips, part of the Ryzen AI 400-series, are designed for business PCs and support unique Windows 11 features, but they will not be available for regular consumers. The processors are branded as "Ryzen Pro," indicating their suitability for IT-managed devices, and they aim to provide better graphics without needing a dedicated graphics card.
middle.ko: AMD는 고급 CPU 및 GPU 아키텍처와 신경 처리 장치(NPU)를 포함한 첫 번째 Ryzen AI 데스크톱 프로세서를 출시했습니다. 이 새로운 칩은 Ryzen AI 400 시리즈의 일환으로 비즈니스 PC를 위해 설계되었으며, 독특한 Windows 11 기능을 지원하지만 일반 소비자에게는 제공되지 않을 것입니다. 이 프로세서는 "Ryzen Pro"라는 브랜드로 IT 관리 장치에 적합함을 나타내며, 전용 그래픽 카드 없이도 더 나은 그래픽을 제공하는 것을 목표로 하고 있습니다.

high.en:
AMD has been marketing "Ryzen AI"-branded laptop processors for approximately 18 months, incorporating advanced CPU and GPU architectures designed to leverage the generative AI trend. These processors feature neural processing units (NPUs) that enable local execution of language and image-generation models, as opposed to relying on remote servers. However, until now, AMD's desktop offerings have not included these high-performance NPUs or the Ryzen AI branding.

This situation is changing with the introduction of AMD's first three Ryzen AI desktop chips, compatible with the AM5 CPU socket. The Ryzen AI 400-series CPUs serve as direct successors to the Ryzen 8000G processors, integrating Zen 5 CPU cores, RDNA 3.5 GPU cores, and an NPU capable of 50 trillion operations per second (TOPS). These chips are also the first desktop processors from AMD to meet the criteria for Microsoft’s Copilot+ PC designation, unlocking exclusive Windows 11 features such as Recall and Click to Do.

AMD is unveiling six new chips today, including the 65 W Ryzen AI 7 Pro 450G, Ryzen AI 5 Pro 440G, and Ryzen AI 5 Pro 435G, along with low-power 35 W "GE" variants. All of these chips carry the "Ryzen Pro" branding, indicating their support for essential device management features relevant to business PCs overseen by IT departments. Currently, it appears that AMD will not provide boxed versions for general consumers; instead, these Ryzen AI desktop chips are expected to be primarily integrated into business PCs that require enhanced graphics capabilities without the need for a dedicated graphics card.

technology.title: The winners of the smartphone boom think they know what the next big tech gadget is - CNN

elementary.en: The next tech devices may not have screens and could record you without your knowledge. Qualcomm has created a new chip for these devices, which could include smart glasses and wearable gadgets, to help them perform tasks better than smartphones.
elementary.ko: 다음 기술 장치는 화면이 없을 수 있으며, 당신의 모르게 녹음할 수 있습니다. Qualcomm은 이러한 장치들을 위해 새로운 칩을 만들었으며, 이 칩은 스마트 안경과 착용 가능한 기기를 포함할 수 있어 스마트폰보다 더 나은 작업을 수행하도록 도와줄 것입니다.

middle.en: The next generation of tech devices may not have screens and could be worn as discreet items like pendants or glasses, often recording without users realizing it. Qualcomm has launched a new chip, the Snapdragon Wear Elite, designed for these types of gadgets, which can run AI models and communicate with other devices without draining the battery. However, tech companies must convince consumers that these new devices can offer better functionality than smartphones while addressing privacy concerns.
middle.ko: 차세대 기술 장치는 화면이 없고 펜던트나 안경과 같은 눈에 띄지 않는 아이템으로 착용될 수 있으며, 사용자들이 인식하지 못하는 사이에 녹음을 할 수 있습니다. Qualcomm은 이러한 유형의 기기를 위해 설계된 Snapdragon Wear Elite라는 새로운 칩을 출시했으며, 이 칩은 AI 모델을 실행하고 배터리를 소모하지 않고 다른 장치와 통신할 수 있습니다. 그러나 기술 회사들은 이러한 새로운 장치가 스마트폰보다 더 나은 기능을 제공할 수 있다는 것을 소비자에게 설득하고 개인 정보 보호 문제를 해결해야 합니다.

high.en:
The next generation of technology devices may forgo traditional screens, operating discreetly and potentially recording users without their awareness. Qualcomm, a key player in the smartphone chip market, has introduced a new chip aimed at facilitating such innovations, responding to increasing interest from tech companies in wearable gadgets like pendants, pins, and glasses.

As the tech industry seeks to capitalize on the popularity of AI, there is a race to develop new products that could rival the smartphone's impact, akin to the internet's role in its emergence. Qualcomm's chips are integral to devices from major manufacturers such as Samsung and Meta, positioning the company as a significant indicator of trends in consumer technology.

However, for these new devices to gain traction, they must demonstrate superior functionality compared to smartphones while addressing privacy concerns associated with covert recording capabilities. Ziad Asghar, head of Qualcomm’s wearables division, noted that the demand for innovative gadgets, particularly smart glasses, has exceeded expectations, prompting the development of the Snapdragon Wear Elite chip. This chip is designed to support various applications, including AI processing and seamless connectivity with other devices, without excessive battery drain.

Despite the potential advantages of wearable technology, such as real-time translations and contextual awareness through integrated sensors, companies face challenges in persuading consumers to adopt these new devices. The experience of Humane, a startup that struggled with its AI Pin, underscores the difficulties in gaining market acceptance. Nonetheless, Asghar remains optimistic about the efficiency of wearables in performing specific tasks, suggesting that their integration into daily life could enhance user experience significantly.

technology.title: ChatGPT vs Claude: I put both default models through 7 real-world tests — one is the clear winner - Tom's Guide

elementary.en: ChatGPT-5.2 and Claude Sonnet 4.6 are two AI assistants that are easy to use without technical skills. In tests, Claude performed better in writing quality and clarity, while ChatGPT effectively argued for AI automation in business.
elementary.ko: ChatGPT-5.2와 Claude Sonnet 4.6는 기술적 지식 없이도 쉽게 사용할 수 있는 두 가지 AI 도우미입니다. 테스트에서 Claude는 글쓰기 품질과 명확성에서 더 나은 성과를 보였고, ChatGPT는 비즈니스에서 AI 자동화의 필요성을 효과적으로 주장했습니다.

middle.en: ChatGPT-5.2 and Claude Sonnet 4.6 are two AI assistants designed for everyday productivity without needing technical skills. In a comparison of their performance on real-world tasks, Claude excelled in writing quality by creating a compelling narrative, while ChatGPT effectively presented structured reasoning for automation in business. This evaluation helps users decide which AI assistant might better fit their workflow needs.
middle.ko: ChatGPT-5.2와 Claude Sonnet 4.6는 기술적 지식 없이도 일상적인 생산성을 위해 설계된 두 가지 AI 도우미입니다. 실제 작업에서의 성능 비교에서 Claude는 매력적인 서사를 만들어내며 글쓰기 품질에서 우수성을 보였고, ChatGPT는 비즈니스 자동화를 위한 체계적인 논리를 효과적으로 제시했습니다. 이 평가는 사용자가 어떤 AI 도우미가 자신의 작업 흐름에 더 적합할지를 결정하는 데 도움을 줍니다.

high.en:
enhancing efficiency. It effectively highlighted the potential for increased productivity and customer satisfaction through automation.

Claude Sonnet 4.6 approached the scenario by emphasizing the emotional toll of time spent on repetitive tasks, advocating for automation as a means to reclaim valuable time and focus on strategic growth. It presented a more empathetic perspective, appealing to the business owner's desire for work-life balance.

Winner: ChatGPT-5.2 wins for its clear, logical argumentation that effectively outlines the strategic advantages of AI automation.

3. Clarity in complex explanations

Prompt: Explain the concept of machine learning to a non-technical audience.

ChatGPT-5.2 provided a straightforward explanation of machine learning, using relatable analogies and avoiding jargon, which made the concept accessible to a general audience.

Claude Sonnet 4.6, while also clear, employed a more narrative style, weaving in examples that illustrated the concept through real-world applications. This approach engaged the audience but risked losing some clarity in the process.

Winner: ChatGPT-5.2 wins for its direct and clear explanation that prioritizes understanding.

4. Creativity in content generation

Prompt: Generate a marketing slogan for a new eco-friendly product.

ChatGPT-5.2 produced a catchy slogan that effectively communicated the product's benefits while maintaining a playful tone.

Claude Sonnet 4.6 crafted a slogan that was imaginative and evocative, appealing to emotional resonance and the values of sustainability.

Winner: Claude Sonnet 4.6 wins for its creative and emotionally engaging slogan.

5. Handling ambiguity

Prompt: A client requests a project update but provides vague details.

ChatGPT-5.2 responded with a structured inquiry, asking clarifying questions to gather necessary information and ensure a comprehensive update.

Claude Sonnet 4.6 took a more conversational approach, suggesting potential updates based on common project milestones while inviting the client to share more specifics.

Winner: ChatGPT-5.2 wins for its systematic approach to resolving ambiguity.

6. Time management advice

Prompt: How can someone improve their time management skills?

ChatGPT-5.2 offered a detailed list of strategies, including prioritization techniques and tools for tracking tasks, providing a practical framework for improvement.

Claude Sonnet 4.6 shared a more narrative-driven response, emphasizing the importance of self-reflection and personal anecdotes to illustrate time management principles.

Winner: ChatGPT-5.2 wins for its practical and actionable advice.

7. Overall user experience

Both models offer user-friendly interfaces and quick responses, but Claude Sonnet 4.6 has gained popularity for its engaging narrative style, while ChatGPT-5.2 is praised for its clarity and structured responses.

In conclusion, while both AI assistants excel in different areas, the choice between them may ultimately depend on individual preferences for clarity versus creativity in communication.

technology.title: Motorola News | Motorola's new partnership with GrapheneOS - Motorola News

elementary.en: Motorola announced new security features and partnerships at Mobile World Congress to enhance smartphone safety and provide better analytics for businesses. They are working with the GrapheneOS Foundation to improve mobile security and introduced Moto Analytics for better device performance tracking.
elementary.ko: 모토로라는 모바일 월드 콩그레스에서 스마트폰 안전성을 높이고 기업을 위한 더 나은 분석 기능을 제공하기 위해 새로운 보안 기능과 파트너십을 발표했습니다. 그들은 모바일 보안을 개선하기 위해 GrapheneOS 재단과 협력하고, 장치 성능 추적을 위한 Moto Analytics를 도입했습니다.

middle.en:
Motorola announced new consumer and enterprise solutions at Mobile World Congress, including a partnership with the GrapheneOS Foundation to enhance smartphone security. The company introduced Moto Secure and Moto Analytics to improve security and provide real-time insights for businesses. These developments demonstrate Motorola's commitment to delivering advanced technology with a focus on user privacy and security. 

모토로라는 모바일 월드 콩그레스에서 새로운 소비자 및 기업 솔루션을 발표하며, 스마트폰 보안을 강화하기 위해 GrapheneOS 재단과 파트너십을 체결했습니다. 이 회사는 보안을 개선하고 기업을 위한 실시간 통찰력을 제공하기 위해 Moto Secure와 Moto Analytics를 도입했습니다. 이러한 발전은 사용자 프라이버시와 보안에 중점을 둔 첨단 기술을 제공하겠다는 모토로라의 의지를 보여줍니다.
middle.ko: (번역 준비 중)

high.en:
Motorola, a Lenovo Company, announced new consumer and enterprise solutions at the Mobile World Congress, highlighting a partnership with the GrapheneOS Foundation to enhance smartphone security for users globally. The collaboration aims to integrate advanced security features into future devices, leveraging GrapheneOS's expertise in mobile security and Motorola's extensive experience in the field.

In addition to this partnership, Motorola introduced Moto Secure and Moto Analytics. Moto Secure enhances the security framework, while Moto Analytics offers an enterprise-grade analytics platform that provides IT administrators with real-time insights into device performance, enabling efficient troubleshooting and maintaining productivity. This platform integrates with existing enterprise environments and scales with organizational growth.

Furthermore, Motorola expanded its Moto Secure platform with the Private Image Data feature, which automatically removes sensitive metadata from new photos, thereby enhancing user privacy. These initiatives underscore Motorola's commitment to delivering advanced technology with a focus on security for customers worldwide.
